His summoner, the goddess Clementine, gives him an unusual mission: to make seven girls, destined to become the mothers of the next generation of heroes, fall in love again. These girls have lost their ability to love due to a curse cast by the Demon Lord. In other words, Haruchika must convince them all to fall in love with him! To return to his world and hear the answer to his confession, Haruchika accepts this mission and sets out to save another world through love. Having mastered the art of romance through his study of female psychology, his journey to fulfill their first loves begins — a romantic tale about saving another world through the power of love! title: LORD
synopsis: The story is set in the period from the end of the Later Han Dynasty to the Three Kingdoms Period in China. In 184 AD, a brave general of the Nanukoku Kingdom, who contributed to Himiko's unification of Japan, decides to take over the "hegemony" of the Later Han Dynasty. He travels alone to Yushu in the Later Han Dynasty, where he meets the three brothers Liu Bei, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei. He works with these three brothers, but soon learns that Liu Bei is an evil person. One day, Liu Bei tries to kill a criminal to test his new sword, but Pei Yu stops him and even cuts off Liu Bei's head. Guan Yu and Zhang Fei are outraged, but Pei Yu sees and points out that the two were not following Liu Bei out of pure heart. Afterwards, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei witnessed Puo Yu's actions and thoughts and decided to make Puo Yu the new Liu Bei, and the three of them took a new oath of brotherhood in Taoyuan. Note: The story is loosely based on the Three Kingdoms period, using both real and original characters and events from the historical period in Chinese history and folklore of the Romance of the Three Kingdoms.

title: Tamayomi
synopsis: In her Junior High years, the pitcher Yomi Takeda was not able to get very far in a cross-school baseball tournament. Since the catcher on her team wasn't at her level, she couldn't use her signature move, the "Magic Throw," and eventually regretted not being able to use it. After Junior High, she decided to stop playing baseball and went to Shin Koshigaya High School, a school without a baseball club. There, she found her long lost childhood friend, Tamaki Yamazaki, who used to play catch ball​ with her when they were kids. Tamaki also played baseball during her Junior High years as a catcher, and could even catch Yomi's "Magic Throw!" Their promise with each other during their childhood could now be fulfilled! Walking together on the road of baseball once again... The story of the girls who love baseball will begin!

Although she started her life as a "Master Jewel," she was not able to help people as much as she would like. Then she meets Alecrea, a master jeweler who is rumored to be a "Jewel Killer." synopsis: Five years ago, a band of six adventurers defeated the conquering armies of Marmo, the dark island, and saved the accursed island, Lodoss. Since that day, the survivors have been honored as heroes, and their deeds have become legends. But the evil never perished...it retreated, waited and schemed. Now, the Black Knight of Marmo has returned to threaten the accursed island once more. Old heroes must heed the call to defend their homeland and new heroes are forged as the battle for Lodoss begins anew... (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

title: Kanojo wa Kyou mo Katazukanai
titleNative: カノジョは今日もかたづかない
synonyms: She Is Not Good At Cleaning Every Day
synopsis: Aina Tawara works hard at her job, she's well regarded by her colleagues, and she has a steady boyfriend of six months. But her problem is that she just can't keep her room clean. On the other hand, there is Fukagawa-san, a man who always has a clean desk, doesn't care what others think, and never works overtime. He is the complete opposite of Aina, which makes him unappealing to her in every way. On the one hand, he is annoying, but on the other hand, she is envious of him... When Aina couldn't get her place tidied up in time, she had to cancel her date with her boyfriend, and it was going to be the worst Christmas ever. When Fukagawa-san saw her depressed, he invited her over to his place…? This is a story for the messy people. For those people who can't keep thing tidy at work and at life! (Source: Pixiv Comic, translated) Note: Chapter count includes a bonus chapter.

title: Kakure Tensei @COMIC
synopsis: In a remote corner of another world where only the nobility can use magic, a thirty-something office worker is reincarnated as a villager named Ren (5 years old). He enjoyed a laid-back life in the countryside, until the Cruel Angels (Pretty Angels) took a liking to him... Even though he wanted to be lazy, he ended up playing hide-and-seek, reading to them, calming them down, and more from morning to night, all because he was so caring! One day, while he was trying to think of ways to be lazy, a monster suddenly appeared in the peaceful village. When the problem children were targeted, the usually unmotivated Ren unleashed a hidden power he had been hiding to avoid trouble! This is the heroic tale of a carefree reincarnated boy who, with a sense of relief, babysits (and saves the country)! (Source: Corona EX, translated)
